source_pr.title: test: fix data race caused by update global config
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Fix data race

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:

- added UpdateGlobal function in the config package.
- added RestoreFunc function in the config package.
- use the two functions to change and restore global config in test.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

fix_pattern: test: fix data race caused by update global config

evidence: evidence: PR title: fix data race caused by update global config.
evidence: diff adjusts config handling and touches many tests to avoid global config races under parallel execution (config/config.go and multiple *_test.go).
